headline: Morgan Stanley slashes targets on 3 software stocks after earnings
summary: Morgan Stanley updated its outlook on three software stocks following earnings, highlighting how differently AI adoption is impacting companies across the sector. Morgan Stanley believes investors are increasingly focused on companies that can use AI to drive durable revenue growth; for example ...

headline: Morgan Stanley revisits NetApp stock price target after earnings
summary: NetApp (NTAP) stock jumped about 22% on May 29 after reporting strong fourth-quarter earnings and raising expectations for FY2027. Morgan Stanley responded by lifting its price target from $88 to $137, citing growing evidence that enterprise AI spending is beginning to translate into real storage ...

headline: Saudi contractor MGC seeks up to $799 million in Riyadh IPO
summary: Investing.com -- Saudi Arabia’s Mutlaq Al-Ghowairi Contracting Co. (MGC) is seeking to raise as much as 3 billion riyals ($799 million) through an initial public offering in Riyadh, according to a statement cited by Bloomberg on Sunday.

headline: Morgan Stanley Trims Stanley Black & Decker (SWK) Forecast Despite Operational Progress
summary: With an annual dividend yield of 4.19% as of May 29, Stanley Black & Decker, Inc. (NYSE:SWK) is included among the Dividend Aristocrats Ranked By Yield: Top 10 Stocks. On May 28, Morgan Stanley cut the firm’s price recommendation on Stanley Black & Decker, Inc. (NYSE:SWK) to $84 from $87. It reiterated an Equal Weight rating […]
